title: Netherite Crowns
description: Turns your Netherite Helmet into a Crown!
body:
Netherite Crowns is a simple, stylish resource pack that replaces the default Netherite helmet with a crown. Designed for fantasy lovers, kingdom builders, or just players who want to rule their world in style without giving up that sweet Netherite protection.
Features:

- Replaces the Netherite Helmet with a detailed crown model
- Vanilla-friendly texture
- Perfect for fantasy, medieval, and aesthetic-themed builds
- Pairs well with custom skins for a royal, medieval look
- Best of all, No performance impact
- 
Put simply: You’re still wearing Netherite... you just look way better doing it.
